description: Gear up for the new academic year with our vibrant, education-themed promotional email template. Perfect for a back to school sale, this template helps you announce discounts and last chance offerings in a simple yet engaging manner. The colorful design is sure to capture the attention of kids and parents alike, making it a fantastic tool for any seasonal promotion. With its focus on education and learning, it's a great way to show your support for children's academic journey. Whether you're hosting an event or offering a school-related promotion, this template is a brilliant choice. Don't miss out on the opportunity to make your back to school sale a success.
short_description: Jumpstart the academic year with our vibrant, education-themed email template. Perfect for back to school sales, it captures attention with colorful designs, promoting discounts and last chance deals. Ideal for seasonal promotions and events, supporting children's learning journey.

designer.description: Hi! My name is Martin. I’m a web / user interface designer located in Bulgaria, Europe. Since the past 10 years I’ve worked on a variety of projects for small, medium and large companies. I enjoy doing pixel perfect designs with attention to every detail.
